command:
import subprocess, time, os

chrome_path = r'C:\Program Files\Google\Chrome\Application\chrome.exe'
user_data = r'C:\Users\Revexn\AppData\Local\Google\Chrome\User Data'
url = 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/0/add-a-place'

if not os.path.exists(chrome_path):
    chrome_path = r'C:\Program Files (x86)\Google\Chrome\Application\chrome.exe'

try:
    proc = subprocess.Popen([chrome_path, f'--user-data-dir={user_data}', '--profile-directory=Default', url])
    print(f'Chrome opened with PID: {proc.pid}')
    print(f'URL: {url}')
    print('Chrome launched successfully with user profile')
except Exception as e:
    print(f'ERROR: {e}')
description: فتح Chrome العادي مع ملف تعريف المستخدم على صفحة إضافة مكان Google Maps
